InsightWorkbenchItemEmptyView_Descriptio: Insight Workbench gives you a unified view of your Fabric environment. Explore metadata, analyze semantic models, trace data lineage, and manage requirements — all linked together.
InsightWorkbenchItemEmptyView_StartButto: Explore Fabric metadata, semantic models, lineage, and requirements — all in one place.
InsightWorkbench_Hub_Description: Select a capability below to get started. Your work is automatically saved across sessions.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_Descri: Browse, search, and filter all Fabric artifacts across workspaces.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_PhaseN: Metadata Explorer is implemented in Phase 2.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_Intro: Browse artifacts across workspaces. Search, filter, group, and review access level summary.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_Search: Search by name, type, or workspace
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_LoadEr: Failed to load artifacts. Verify workspace access and try again.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_LoadEm: No visible artifacts were returned for the current user in the accessible workspaces.
InsightWorkbench_MetadataExplorer_Empty: No artifacts match the current filters.
InsightWorkbench_SemanticAnalyzer_Descri: Explore tables, measures, columns, and dependencies inside semantic models.
InsightWorkbench_SemanticAnalyzer_PhaseN: Semantic Model Analyzer is implemented in Phase 3.
InsightWorkbench_LineageGraph_Descriptio: Trace cross-workspace data lineage and report usage — upstream and downstream.
InsightWorkbench_LineageGraph_PhaseNote: Lineage Graph is implemented in Phase 4.
InsightWorkbench_RequirementsBoard_Descr: Manage requirements as Kanban cards linked to Fabric metadata and insights.
InsightWorkbench_RequirementsBoard_Phase: Requirements Board is implemented in Phase 5.
